channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT This Week in India
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in India — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Super Subbu — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Telugu · Just released — verdict soon — An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?

item.title: Charukesi — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Tamil · Not enough ratings yet — A Carnatic musician with Alzheimer's grapples with his prodigal son's lifestyle choices, exploring the intersection of music, memory, and family relationships.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Gatta Kusthi 2 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Tamil · Just released — verdict soon — Picks up after the first film, with Veera and Keerthi balancing parenthood and Keerthi's wrestling career, featuring a role reversal where Veera takes on more…

item.title: Baby Do Die Do — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Just released — verdict soon — A deaf and mute serial killer in Mumbai can only hear her dead sister's voice as she commits murders for mysterious reasons.

item.title: Alpha — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Just released — verdict soon — When Sita, a highly trained assassin raised in isolation as a super-soldier by a rogue commander, discovers the dark truth about her family and her stolen…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Alliance — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.

item.title: The Bear — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…

item.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: House of the Dragon — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Cocktail 2 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · ★ 5.6 · Decent one-time watch — After a decade together, Diya and Kunal's relationship is shaken when Ally, an old friend, re-enters their lives.

item.title: Maa Inti Bangaram — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — Through both her moments of fear and bravery, a woman discovers that embracing her vulnerabilities is as vital to her inner strength as facing challenges…

item.title: Toy Story 5 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they…

item.title: Raakh — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — When two teenagers vanish, a close-knit family is shattered and the city is left on edge. Determined to uncover the truth, a relentless officer leads a…
